message:
feat: MVCC transaction lifecycle (bd-3t3.3)

Implements §5.4 Transaction Lifecycle: Begin/Read/Write/Commit/Abort
with Savepoints for both Serialized and Concurrent transaction modes.

Key types: TransactionManager, BeginKind, MvccError, Savepoint,
CommitResponse. Covers DEFERRED→writer upgrade, FCW freshness
checks, SSI validation, page-level locking, schema epoch checks,
and savepoint rollback (preserving page locks + SSI witnesses per
spec). 37 new tests (96 total in crate), clippy clean, UBS 0 critical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
